notes: Solid Galaga clone with working formation, dive attacks, tractor beam capture mechanic, dual-ship mode, and challenge stages, but enemy entry animation uses a broken bezier (start position baked into curve causing jitter), challenge stage bonus logic is flawed, and visual sprites are blocky pixel rectangles rather than authentic Galaga art.

An incredibly impressive and complete Galaga clone; the only minor flaw is that challenge stage enemies sit in the grid forever instead of flying away, but the tractor beam, dual ship, and enemy formations work flawlessly.

A competent but noticeably incomplete Galaga clone with working movement/shooting and some capture ideas, yet flawed stage/state logic, weak enemy formation authenticity, and several gameplay inaccuracies keep it well below a strong benchmark build.
